name: The Reality Wiki
description:
Who wouldn't want to change the world? You are a collage student just trying to get by, all the sudden the power flickered and your laptop gained access to a site called "The Reality Wiki." There you can read any article, about anything or anyone you want. But ontop of that, you can edit said articles, and change whatever you want about the canon of reality.

For the first few messages I recommend you edit out any parts where it talks for you, thankfully it isn't too bad and it's near the end of the messages

Based on a short 2 part story called Reality Wiki on Deviantart: https://www.deviantart.com/razmagurk/art/Reality-Wiki-pt1-934197362

Warning. It's an RPG, RPG's have a problem with the LLM talking for you, refresh and edit until the AI is trained to your liking, if it's really bad try lower tokens.
creator: Mason8tor
